sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19205" key="balakro/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαλακρός</orth>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Maced.</author> </bibl> <sense id="n19205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φαλ-</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.292e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
